booking.desc: Instant booking, deposit, cancellation and refund rules.

trust.title: Trust & Safety
trust.desc: Provider verification, quality guarantee, and reporting.

items.a: On the signup page, enter your phone number, password, and account role. If SMS verification is enabled, you will receive a code.
Use the password recovery option. Login is done with phone number and password, and some accounts require SMS verification.
Select an available time, pay the deposit, and the booking is held until final confirmation.
Yes, identity and background are checked, and a verification badge is shown.

items.q: How does the quality guarantee work?

dynamic.cancel: Cancellation is free up to {hours} hours before the start time. For closer times, final penalty details are being completed.
dynamic.refund_with_amount: If dissatisfaction is confirmed, refunds are issued up to {amount} toman.
dynamic.refund_fallback: Refund policy details are being finalized and will be announced on the policy page.
